creator: list1@gjunka.com
text:
Created attachment 166048
logs from both builds, options for all ports and the file 10rel2amd64-local-crayon2-pkglist with the list of packages

This option fails to compile databases/firebird25-client:
poudriere bulk -j 10rel2amd64 -p local -z crayon2 -f 10rel2amd64-local-crayon2-pkglist

However, testports compiles the port without problem:
poudriere testport -j 10rel2amd64 -p local -z crayon2 -o databases/firebird25-client

I searched the internet and found a similar problem reported by someone else:
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2015-September/100609.html

Problem with poudriere or firebird25-client?

I am attaching the logs from both builds, options for all ports and the file 10rel2amd64-local-crayon2-pkglist with the list of packages. Please let me know if you would require any additional information.
